title: Where to write Javascript in Monday.com
excerpt:
I would like to write Java script in Monday.com . 
I want to write it to post some data to external 
application using JS . But not getting where exactly 
write the JS code.

posts.author: raghavendra.patil (raghavendra)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to write Java script in Monday.com .
I want to write it to post some data to external

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
The documentation can guide you on how to accomplish the task you are describing. You can find the documentation here.
https://monday.com/developers/apps/intro
https://monday.com/developers/apps/quickstart-view

posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much Appreciated @kolaai
